rationale.fidelity: Accurately preserves the five-minute decision deadline, routing choices, feasibility constraints, objective, and time-limited incumbent mechanism.
rationale.managerial_framing: Makes the dispatcher, release trigger, choices, stakes, time-quality trade-off, reference-method counterfactual, and operational implication concrete.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Makes no unsupported novelty claim and scholarly positioning is not requested.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Treats better five-minute performance as unproven and specifies controlled statistical evaluation while rejecting universal and downstream claims.
rationale.prose_clarity: Clear and precise but unnecessarily long and repetitive, with encoding artifacts.
rationale.overall: Substantively excellent deadline-aware framing, penalized only for presentation economy.
